column6: Dynamic mobility for thoracic spine and hips.
Primary mass builder. Hinge movement. Keep neutral spine. Set J-hooks at thigh height to unrack.
Shoulders on the bench with the Smith foam pad on the bar. Isolates the glute max at peak contraction. Hold top for 1s.
Full hamstring flexion. Control the eccentric (lowering) for 3s.
Step back into a long stride to bias glutes/hams over quads. Done in place — no walking space needed.
Pure hinge pattern with constant tension. Builds lower back resilience.
Sit on the bench with toes on the step and the padded Smith bar across your knees. Targets the Soleus muscle essential for stabilizing the knee.
Targets upper glute shelf. Stabilizes pelvis laterally.
Anti-rotation: brace and press straight out; resist the pull.
Anti-lateral-flexion: stack hips in a straight line head to heel.
Metabolic finisher: hip-hinge snap; glutes drive the bell.
